---
title: "Calling Julia from R via JuliaCall"
description: |
  In this blog post, we demonstrate how to use a code written in Julia programming language in an R script by using R package JuliaCall.
author:
  - name: Yevgen Ryeznik
  - url: https://yevgen.github.io
date: 2020-11-20
categories:
  - Julia
  - R
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: TRUE
    toc_float: TRUE
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

## What is distill?

Distill is a publication format for scientific and technical writing, native to the web.

Learn more about using Distill at <https://rstudio.github.io/distill>.

## Observations with noise

```{r scatter-plot}
library(ggplot2)
ds <- tibble::tibble(x = seq(1, 10, by = 0.1), y = cos(x) + rnorm(length(x), sd = 0.5))
ggplot(ds, aes(x, y))+
  geom_point()
```
